silhouette: Soft rounded-square, marshmallow-like body with broad flat faces, very softened corners, pure white fill, confident black outline, no arms or hands, and two short connected lower nubs/feet.
face: Large black dot eyes, tiny calm smile, no brows, and a fixed pair of glossy highlight marks near the upper left corner.
body_language: Composed, tidy, low-balanced, and quietly authoritative; three-quarter, side, and back views must keep the same square volume and rounded rear corner.
do_not_change: Keep the exact rounded-square model-sheet shape.
Keep the upper-left gloss marks, dot eyes, tiny smile, no arms, and two lower nubs.
Keep her posture neat and stable.
Do not make her expression chaotic, severe, limb-like, or exaggerated by default.
